evidence.source_title: Azerbaijan says it foiled alleged IRGC plot
evidence.description: The terror plot announcement came one day after the Nakhchivan drone strikes; analysts and multiple sources noted the two events as part of a coordinated Iranian pressure campaign against Azerbaijan during the broader 2026 regional conflict.

editorial_notes: No confirmed command link established. The proximity (24 hours) and shared IRGC attribution make coordination plausible but unconfirmed.
